Career Insights For Your Growth

  • Post Resume - Prepare before you click that button!

    What is a resume?In professional language, a resume can be described as a resume is an A4 sheet or two that amounts to a jo...

  • Top 7 Reasons You Need to Have a Career Portal Set-Up

    When it comes to your company, the first thing that you need to do after you start to hire employees is to create a career port...

  • Scope and Future Prospects of Mechanical Engineering In India

    Mechanical engineering, one of the oldest branches of Engineering, deals with machine design, manufacturing, and maintenance....

  • Important tips to find your path to success in Malaysia

    Malaysia's emphasis on commerce, finance, biotechnology, and medicine makes it a perfect setting for jaunting graduates to sett...

PlacementIndia - India's Top Job Board and Recruitment Platform

Since 1999, PlacementIndia has played an important role as India's Top Job Board and Recruitment Platform (Trusted by Millions), helping connect talented professionals with companies.

If you're on the hunt for a job or planning to hire, PlacementIndia will help you make the right decision at every turn with 1 crore+ registered job seekers and 2.5 lakh+ job postings. PlacementIndia provides employers with strong tools to ease and quicken the process of hiring. With Free Job Posting, Free Search Candidate Resume options, resume downloads, and an Advanced Applicant Tracking System (ATS), recruitment has never been so seamless.

PlacementIndia finds the right partnerships for thousands of business owners each year. If you're looking to grow your team, this is one of the most trusted Free Job Posting Sites in India and International markets.

Make your account on PlacementIndia.com and search job openings throughout India or abroad. The company always helps job seekers, If you are seeking a full-time or part-time job, remote jobs, work from home jobs, or night shift jobs in any Private or top MNC Companies, the website has filter options for them as role, location, qualification, experience, salary, industry and work mode. Also helps freshers, women professionals and highly skilled individuals alike. With our easy-to-use interface, you can upload resume, apply to jobs quickly, and get discovered by top employers.

PlacementIndia has an extensive database of over 90,000+ recruitment agencies across India and internationally, so you can find everything you need for your career or hiring. Whether you're looking for guidance or a solid hiring partner, you'll find what you need in our List of Recruitment Agencies.

read more
